commands.review_summary:
The PR changes forced gateway restarts to use a 5s drain window and updates run-loop tests to expect active-task, embedded-run, and close-drain waits.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests 0. Total +23 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and v2026.6.10 return 0ms for forced restarts, skip active-work waits, and the close handler immediately reports a 0ms reply drain as undrained. I did not run a live forced restart in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed for live real-behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the bounded forced-restart compatibility tradeoff.

target.title: fix(gateway): preserve pending replies on forced restart

commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Cargo-based Rust `launcher/` CLI wrapper, adds several root workspace/review files, and replaces an existing iOS package script with `launcher:build`.

PR surface: Docs +279, Config 0, Other +375. Total +654 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers: the live PR file API shows the package script replacement and unrelated root artifacts on the current head. I did not run the launcher because this read-only review only needed source evidence for those defects.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide whether core should own this launcher surface, while the contributor must first clean the branch and provide real behavior proof.
